source: Carried from PPC_Analysis_2026-04-08 — advertising.amazon.com blocked (7th consecutive day). Settlement period closed 4/11 at -$314.09, confirming ~$19.59 in additional ad spend April 8-10.
data_quality: STALE — keyword-level data from 2026-04-04. Settlement-derived ad spend estimates updated.

confirmed_ad_spend.source: Payments Dashboard delta — prior settlement closed 4/11 at -$314.09
confirmed_ad_spend.note: Settlement charged $314.09 on 4/11, up $19.59 from $294.50 on 4/8. This covers 3 days (Apr 8-10). ~$6.53/day incremental — lower than prior $19.77/day average, suggesting some campaigns may have been throttled or budgets underspent. April 9 estimated spend: ~$6.53-19.77.

per_keyword_performance._note: Keyword-level data carried from 2026-04-04 — last successful Campaign Manager scrape. 7th consecutive day of inaccessibility.

keywords.keyword: cat water fountain stainless steel wireless
wireless stainless steel pet water fountain

wasted_spend.note: ALL 4 active PPC keywords have ZERO conversions. Settlement charge of $314.09 confirms prior period total expenses included massive ad spend. Campaigns still NOT paused (7th day of recommendation being ignored).

action_plan_ranked.action: PAUSE all manual campaigns immediately — OVERDUE 5 days
action_plan_ranked.rationale: Manual campaign ACoS 141%+ lifetime (estimated). Zero conversions on all tracked keywords. Settlement confirmed $314.09 charged — avg $6.53/day residual spend still running. Each day of inaction costs ~$7-20.
action_plan_ranked.urgency: CRITICAL — OVERDUE since 04/04. Now 7 days past recommendation.

action_plan_ranked.action: Reduce auto campaign budget from $15/day to $5/day
action_plan_ranked.rationale: Auto campaign performs relatively better (ACoS ~72%) but still losing money. Reduce to gather data at lower cost while fixing listing.

action_plan_ranked.action: Negative-match zero-conversion keywords in auto campaign
action_plan_ranked.rationale: Prevent auto campaign from bidding on same keywords that failed in manual campaign.

action_plan_ranked.action: Fix listing conversion before resuming any PPC
action_plan_ranked.rationale: 3.38% CVR from organic traffic vs 0% from paid. Fix listing or targeting before re-spending.

action_plan_ranked.action: Test exact-match 'cordless cat water fountain' at low bid ($0.50)
action_plan_ranked.rationale: 8,900 SV, 0.42% CTR — best CTR among active keywords. Start at tight bid after pausing manuals.

action_plan_ranked.action: Add 'battery operated cat fountain' exact-match ($0.50 bid)
action_plan_ranked.rationale: 7,200 SV, 7/10 competitors use this keyword. Currently untargeted.

action_plan_ranked.action: Add 'quiet cat water fountain' exact-match ($0.50 bid)
action_plan_ranked.rationale: 4,100 SV. Paw Pure's 20dB claim is a genuine differentiator.
Paw Pure lacks motion sensor. 8/10 competitors have it. Wasted clicks.

action_plan_ranked.action: Negative-match 'with app' and 'wifi' across all campaigns
action_plan_ranked.rationale: HAPAW 2026 has app/WiFi — Paw Pure doesn't. Avoid feature-mismatch clicks.

action_plan_ranked.action: Monitor organic BSR before scaling PPC back up
action_plan_ranked.rationale: BSR now 136,306 (worsened from 129,598 after 3 days with no sales). Organic momentum stalled.

single_most_important_action.action: PAUSE manual campaigns IMMEDIATELY — this is 5 days overdue
single_most_important_action.why: Settlement period closed at -$314.09. The additional $19.59 from April 8-10 represents continued ad waste even after 5+ days of pause recommendations. Every day campaigns run costs ~$7-20 with ZERO keyword conversions. New settlement period started April 11 — pause now to avoid another month of waste.
single_most_important_action.expected_impact: Save ~$138-245/week. New settlement period clean slate — start it with campaigns paused and organic focus.
